Test Case: Verify VAN Validation API accepts valid VAN with mapped dealer
Precondition:
1. Valid VAN exists in van_dealer_mappings
 2. Dealer has outstanding invoices
 3. API credentials configured
Test Steps:
1. Send validation request with valid VAN (Bene_acc_no)
 2. Include valid Corp_id and signature
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 00 (Success)
 2. Response includes dealer name and VAN details
 3. van_payment_collections record created with status=validated

Test Case: Verify VAN Validation API rejects invalid/unmapped VAN
Precondition: 1. VAN does not exist in van_dealer_mappings
Test Steps:
1. Send validation request with unmapped VAN
 2. Include valid Corp_id and signature
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 01 (Invalid VAN)
 2. Error message indicates VAN not found
 3. No van_payment_collections record created
Actual Result: {"Stts_flg":"F","Err_cd":"002","message":"Virtual Account Number not found or inactive"}

Test Case: Verify VAN Validation API rejects inactive dealer VAN
Precondition: 1. VAN exists but dealer is_active=false in dealers table
Test Steps: 1. Send validation request with VAN of inactive dealer
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 01 or appropriate error
 2. Error indicates dealer is inactive

Test Case: Verify VAN Posting API successfully posts validated payment
Precondition:
1. Payment validated (status=validated in van_payment_collections)
 2. Dealer has outstanding invoices
Test Steps:
1. Send posting request with same transaction details
 2. Include valid UTR and amount
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 00 (Success)
 2. van_payment_collections status=posted
 3. Cash receipt created
 4. Journal entry created with Bank 1812
 5. Invoice allocations created (FIFO)

Test Case: Verify VAN Posting API rejects unvalidated payment
Precondition: 1. No prior validation for this transaction
Test Steps: 1. Send posting request without prior validation
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 02 (Validation Required)
 2. Error indicates payment must be validated first
 3. No records created

Test Case: Verify VAN Posting API rejects duplicate posting (same UTR)
Precondition: 1. Payment already posted with same UTR
Test Steps: 1. Send posting request with already posted UTR
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 04 (Duplicate)
 2. Error indicates duplicate UTR
 3. No new records created

Test Case: Verify VAN Posting with amount mismatch between validation and posting
Precondition:
1. Payment validated with amount X
 2. Posting request has amount Y (different)
Test Steps:
1. Validate payment with amount 10000
 2. Post payment with amount 15000
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 05 (Amount Mismatch)
 2. Error indicates amount mismatch
 3. No posting occurs
Actual Result:
The diff of 0.01 is ignored and transaction processed:
https://linear.app/daee-issues/issue/DAEE-38/van-issues#comment-1a319edb

But for mismatch > 0.01:
{"Stts_flg":"F","Err_cd":"002","message":"Transaction amount mismatch between validation and posting"}% is returned

Test Case: Verify posting accepts matching sender account (exact match)
Precondition:
1. Payment validated with sender_account=1234567890
 2. Posting has same sender account
Test Steps:
1. Validate with Sndr_acnt=1234567890
 2. Post with Sndr_acnt=1234567890
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 00 (Success)
 2. Payment posted successfully

Test Case: Verify posting accepts sender account with whitespace differences
Precondition:
1. Payment validated with sender_account=" 1234567890 "
 2. Posting has "1234567890"
Test Steps:
1. Validate with Sndr_acnt with leading/trailing spaces
 2. Post with trimmed Sndr_acnt
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 00 (Success)
 2. Normalized comparison accepts payment

Test Case: Verify posting accepts sender account with case differences
Precondition:
1. Payment validated with sender_account="ABC123"
 2. Posting has "abc123"
Test Steps:
1. Validate with Sndr_acnt=ABC123
 2. Post with Sndr_acnt=abc123
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 00 (Success)
 2. Case-insensitive comparison accepts payment

Test Case: Verify posting rejects mismatched sender account
Precondition:
1. Payment validated with sender_account=1234567890
 2. Posting has 9876543210
Test Steps:
1. Validate with Sndr_acnt=1234567890
 2. Post with Sndr_acnt=9876543210
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 06 (Sender Mismatch)
 2. Error indicates sender account mismatch
 3. No posting occurs
Actual Result: {"Stts_flg":"F","Err_cd":"002","message":"Sender account mismatch between validation and posting"}%

Test Case: Verify posting accepts matching IFSC with case/whitespace differences
Precondition:

 2. Post with Sndr_IFSC= hdfc0001234 (lowercase, spaces)
Expected Resut:
1. Response code: 00 (Success)
 2. Normalized IFSC comparison accepts payment

Test Case: Verify EPD discount applied for payment within 7 days of invoice
Precondition:
1. Invoice dated 01-Jan-2026
 2. EPD slab: 0-7 days = 2.5%
 3. Payment received 05-Jan-2026
Test Steps:
1. Post VAN payment on day 5
 2. Check cash_receipt_applications.discount_taken
Expected Resut:
1. EPD calculated: 2.5% of taxable amount
 2. discount_taken field populated
 3. Invoice balance reduced by (payment + discount)

Test Case: Verify EPD discount applied for payment within 8-15 days
Precondition:
1. Invoice dated 01-Jan-2026
 2. EPD slab: 8-15 days = 2.0%
 3. Payment received 10-Jan-2026
Test Steps:
1. Post VAN payment on day 10
 2. Check cash_receipt_applications.discount_taken
Expected Resut:
1. EPD calculated: 2.0% of taxable amount
 2. discount_taken field populated correctly

Test Case: Verify no EPD discount for payment after 30 days
Precondition:
1. Invoice dated 01-Jan-2026
 2. EPD slabs end at 30 days
 3. Payment received 15-Feb-2026
Test Steps:
1. Post VAN payment on day 45
 2. Check cash_receipt_applications.discount_taken
Expected Resut:
1. discount_taken = 0
 2. Invoice balance reduced by payment amount only

Test Case: Verify EPD calculated on taxable amount (excluding GST)
Precondition:
1. Invoice: Subtotal=10000, GST=1800, Total=11800
 2. EPD slab: 2.5%
 3. Payment within 7 days
Test Steps:
1. Post VAN payment within EPD period
 2. Verify EPD calculation base
Expected Resut:
1. EPD = 2.5% of 10000 = 250 (not 2.5% of 11800)
 2. discount_taken = 250

Test Case: Verify EPD for partial payment allocation
Precondition:
1. Invoice balance=10000
 2. Payment amount=5000
 3. EPD slab: 2.5%
Test Steps:
1. Post partial VAN payment
 2. Verify EPD applied proportionally
Expected Resut:
1. EPD calculated on allocated portion
 2. Invoice balance = 10000 - 5000 - (proportional EPD)

Test Case: Verify EPD for tenant without EPD slabs configured
Precondition:

Test Steps: 1. Post VAN payment for tenant without EPD slabs
Expected Resut:
1. discount_taken = 0 (graceful fallback)
 2. Payment allocated without discount
 3. No errors

Test Case: Verify handling of very large payment amount
